name: Blueberry Bavarian Sweet Dough Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, prepare Crisco Single Crust by substituting 1 teaspoon vanilla for 1 teaspoon of water. Bake and cool completely.
2. For white confectioners coating, melt white chocolate in a double boiler over hot water. Brush on the inside of the baked pie crust.
3. For filling, place 2-1/2 cups blueberries in a large saucepan. Crush the berries. Stir in 1-1/4 cups sugar and cornstarch. Cook and stir on medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Cool. Stir in the remaining 2-1/2 cups blueberries and lemon juice. Refrigerate.
4. For Bavarian layer, place gelatin in cold water to soften. Puree 1 cup blueberries in a small saucepan on low heat. Add the gelatin to the puree and stir until dissolved. Stir in 1/4 cup plus 1-1/2 teaspoons sugar. Remove from heat and cool until almost set. Beat whipping cream in a small bowl at high speed of an electric mixer until stiff peaks form. Fold one third into the puree. Fold the puree into the remaining whipped cream. Refrigerate.
5. To assemble the pie, spoon two thirds of the filling into the coated pie crust. Cover with Bavarian layer. Spoon the remaining one third of the filling in the center of the Bavarian.
6. For topping, spread the whipped cream and garnish with blueberries. Refrigerate until firm.
